scope: Phase C and Phase D local buildout

estimation_model.calibration_formula: if bucket has >=3 trusted samples, calibrated=round(raw*0.8 + bucket_recommended*0.2); otherwise use raw estimate
estimation_model.confidence_rule: high when bucket has >=10 samples, medium when 3-9, low when <3

tasks.title: 定义 Multica Loop 组织层模块边界
tasks.acceptance: 文档列出 routing、policy、side-effect gate、review orchestration 的边界、输入输出、现有脚本和缺口。
tasks.verification: phase-cd plan contains all four organization modules and maps each to scripts/configs

tasks.title: 把 Phase C/D 能力登记进司南能力注册表
tasks.acceptance: sinan-capabilities 记录 phase_c_organization_layer 与 phase_d_project_memory 两个能力。
tasks.verification: sinan-capability-check passes and both capability ids exist

tasks.title: 形成组织层执行路径清单
tasks.acceptance: 明确从 issue intake 到 writeback gate 的本地路径，并标注当前脚本入口。
tasks.verification: phase-cd plan includes intake-to-writeback path and validation commands

tasks.title: 定义组织层缺口和下一轮切片
tasks.acceptance: 文档给出 Phase C 未完成项：模块化封装、状态机统一、review orchestration 自动化边界。
tasks.verification: phase-cd plan has next slices section with Phase C gaps

tasks.title: 定义项目记忆质量规则
tasks.acceptance: 定义 index、文件存在性、分类、标签、复核状态、敏感信息约束和可查询性规则。
tasks.verification: project-memory-policy JSON validates and memory-quality-check reads it

tasks.title: 实现项目记忆质量检查脚本
tasks.acceptance: 脚本检查 memory/index.json、引用文件、必填字段、标签和敏感信息模式，输出 md/json。

tasks.title: 生成当前项目记忆质量报告
tasks.acceptance: run 目录留下 memory-quality-report.md/json，并列出缺口。

tasks.title: 沉淀本轮北极星任务板经验案例
tasks.acceptance: memory/cases 中新增北极星任务板经验，并更新 index.json。
tasks.verification: memory-query can find the new case by FUZ-554 or north-star

tasks.title: 生成 Phase C/D 双线执行报告
tasks.acceptance: 报告列出 C/D 全部任务、完成状态、耗时校准、验证和下一步切片。
tasks.verification: phase-cd-execution-report.md exists and all completed tasks are reflected
